name: RISC-V: 32-bit bit reversal
task: Create /tmp/eval_rvbrev/code.s with a function `bitrev(x)` in RV32I assembly that reverses the bit order of a 32-bit unsigned integer. Entry label is `bitrev`. Calling convention: a0 = input x; return bit-reversed value in a0. Bit 31 ↔ bit 0, bit 30 ↔ bit 1, etc. Implement using shift + mask (no Zbb extension needed). The validator imports /tmp/eval_rvbrev/rvi.py and invokes bitrev on several test values.
